settings.title: Support
settings.description: Configure support categories and rate limits for the ticket system.

common.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

categories.heading: Support categories
categories.intro: Create and organize the categories users choose from when opening a support ticket.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create one to get started.
categories.delete_confirm_named: Delete the category “{name}”? This can't be undone.
categories.delete_confirm_with_tickets: This category still has {count} ticket(s). Deleting it will also delete those tickets. Continue?

category_editor.field_slug_help: Used in the category's URL. Leave blank to generate it from the name.
category_editor.field_color_help: Hex color (e.g. #3b82f6) used for the category's badge.
category_editor.field_icon_help: A Font Awesome class, e.g. fas fa-life-ring.
category_editor.field_position_help: Categories are ordered by this value, lowest first.
category_editor.field_is_appeal_help: Tickets opened in this category are treated as ban appeals.
category_editor.error_save: Couldn't save the category. Please check the fields and try again.

appeal_bans.intro: Control which users are blocked from filing ban appeals.
appeal_bans.search_help: Search by username or email to ban or unban them from filing appeals.
appeal_bans.banned_empty: No users are currently banned from filing appeals.
appeal_bans.error_toggle: Couldn't update the user's appeal-ban status.

rate_limits.heading: Rate limits
rate_limits.intro: Limit how often users can open support tickets and ban appeals.
rate_limits.max_general_per_window_help: How many general support tickets a user may open within the window below.
rate_limits.general_window_hours_help: The rolling time window, in hours, for the general ticket limit.
rate_limits.max_appeals_per_window_help: How many ban-appeal tickets a user may open within the appeal window.
rate_limits.appeal_window_days_help: The rolling time window, in days, for the appeal limit.
rate_limits.max_concurrent_appeals_help: How many appeal tickets a user may have open at the same time.

settings.notify_new_reply_label: Someone replies to my support ticket
settings.notify_new_ticket_label: A new support ticket is opened (staff)
